# ElicitationForm.ElicitationLifecycleState enumeration

The state of an elicitation as tracked by a client awaiting URL-mode completion (spec §20.6).

```csharp
public enum ElicitationLifecycleState
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Pending | `0` | The elicitation is in-flight; a completion notification is still expected. |
| Completed | `1` | The elicitation has already completed. |
